Overall Attack: How much percent the light and heavy attack deal to the other robot relative to the other robots (heavy still does more than light)
Knockback: How much knockback the light and heavy attack deal to the other robot relative to the other robots (heavy still does more than light)
Defense: How resistant this robot is to other robots attacks (robots with a high defense score take less damage than robots with a low defense score)
Knockback resistance: How resistant a robot is to knockback from an attack (robots with a high score here will take less knoback than robots with a low score here)
Speed: How fast the robot moves (the higher the number the faster)
Jump Height: How hight the robot jumps (the higher the number the higher the jump)
Attack Speed: How fast the attack comes out (the higher the number the quicker the attack comes out, attacks with a delay specified still have the delay though)
Light Attack Cooldown: How fast the next light attack can come out after the previous light attack (the higher the number the shorter break in between attacks)
Heavy Attack Cooldown: How fast the next heavy attack can come out after the previous heavy attack (the higher the number the shorter break in between attacks)
Shield Cooldown: How long it takes since the robot used the shield for the robot to use the sheilf again (the higher the number the faster they can use the shield again)
